## What Changed
- Briefly describe the problem and your fix.

## Type Of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/CD

## Quality Checklist
- [ ] I ran `dart format --set-exit-if-changed .` in `fake_call_detector`
- [ ] I ran `flutter analyze` in `fake_call_detector`
- [ ] I ran `flutter test` in `fake_call_detector`
- [ ] I updated tests for changed behavior (or this PR does not need tests)

## Android Permissions / Roles
- [ ] No permission or role changes
- [ ] Permission/role changes included and documented in PR description

## UI Changes
- [ ] No UI changes
- [ ] UI changed and screenshots/video are attached

## Notes For Reviewers
- Mention any risks, edge cases, or follow-up tasks.
